payload.text: Internal Dashboard 2.4.0 is now available for testing. New: users can export data as CSV from all chart views and toggle dark mode for reduced eye strain during late-night shifts. Fixed: a timezone bug that incorrectly shifted chart timestamps by one hour during daylight saving time transitions has been resolved to ensure accurate historical data representation. Breaking: the legacy /api/v1/metrics endpoint has been permanently removed. All client applications must migrate to the /v2/metrics endpoint immediately to maintain data access and avoid service interruptions in the next release cycle.

rubric.task_summary: Generate 60-100 word release notes for v2.4.0 with specific sections and content constraints.
failure_modes: Use of markdown bullets or headers

candidates.solution: We are pleased to announce the release of version 2.4.0 of our internal dashboard tool. This update brings several improvements and important changes for our engineering team. New: We have added CSV export functionality to all chart views, allowing for easier data analysis. Additionally, a highly requested dark mode is now available to reduce eye strain during late-night shifts. Fixed: We resolved a critical timezone bug that previously caused chart timestamps to be one hour off during daylight saving time transitions, ensuring accurate temporal data. Breaking: Please note that the /api/v1/metrics endpoint has been removed. All clients must migrate to /v2/metrics immediately to maintain functionality.
assumptions: The audience is familiar with the concept of DST and API endpoints.
known_risks: Word count might be slightly over 100 if not carefully counted.

candidates.solution: Version 2.4.0 introduces several improvements and critical updates for the internal dashboard tool. New: We added CSV export functionality on all chart views and implemented a dark mode for better visibility during night shifts. Fixed: We resolved a timezone bug that caused chart timestamps to be one hour off during DST transitions, ensuring accurate data representation. Breaking: Please note that the /api/v1/metrics endpoint is removed. Clients must migrate to /v2/metrics immediately to maintain functionality and avoid service disruptions in your integrations.
assumptions: The audience is technical enough to understand 'DST transitions' and 'endpoint migration' without further explanation.
The word count includes all text within the solution string.
Plain text means no markdown formatting like bold or italics, only standard punctuation and spacing.
known_risks: The word count might be slightly over or under if the tokenizer counts differently than the rubric expects.
The term 'Breaking:' might be interpreted as a header by some parsers if not strictly plain text.

candidates.solution: Version 2.4.0 introduces several enhancements and fixes for the internal dashboard tool. New: We now support CSV export on all chart views and have added a dark mode for better usability during night shifts. Fixed: Resolved a timezone bug that previously caused chart timestamps to be one hour off during daylight saving time transitions, ensuring accurate temporal data representation. Breaking: The /api/v1/metrics endpoint has been removed. Clients must migrate to /v2/metrics immediately to maintain functionality and avoid service disruptions in upcoming releases.
assumptions: The audience understands standard release note terminology.
The term 'dark mode' is sufficient without further technical elaboration.
known_risks: Word count might be slightly over if punctuation is counted differently by the evaluator.

candidates.solution: Release notes for version 2.4.0 are now available. New: CSV export is enabled on all chart views, and dark mode is supported. Fixed: A timezone bug causing chart timestamps to be one hour off during DST transitions has been resolved. Breaking: The /api/v1/metrics endpoint is removed. Clients must migrate to /v2/metrics immediately to ensure continued functionality. Please update your integrations accordingly to avoid service disruptions. candidates.solution: Release 2.4.0 introduces enhancements and critical fixes for our internal dashboard tool. New: CSV export is now available on all chart views, and we have added dark mode for improved readability during night shifts. Fixed: A timezone bug causing chart timestamps to shift one hour off during DST transitions has been resolved. Breaking: The /api/v1/metrics endpoint is removed. candidates.solution:
Release Notes for Version 2.4.0

New: We are excited to introduce CSV export capabilities across all chart views, allowing for easier data sharing. Additionally, a new dark mode is now available to reduce eye strain during late-night analysis sessions. This update enhances usability and flexibility for all users.

Fixed: We resolved a critical timezone bug that caused chart timestamps to appear one hour off during daylight saving time transitions. All timestamps now correctly reflect local time regardless of DST changes, ensuring data accuracy for scheduling and reporting purposes.

Breaking: Please note that the /api/v1/metrics endpoint has been removed. All clients must migrate to /v2/metrics immediately to maintain functionality. Failure to update integrations will result in service interruptions.
assumptions: The audience is familiar with basic API concepts.
known_risks: Word count might be slightly over 100 words.

candidates.solution: We are pleased to announce the release of version 2.4.0 for our internal dashboard tool. New: Users can now utilize dark mode and perform CSV exports on all chart views. Fixed: We resolved a timezone bug that caused chart timestamps to be incorrectly displayed by one hour during DST transitions. Breaking: The /api/v1/metrics endpoint has been removed from the system. All internal clients must migrate their requests to the new /v2/metrics endpoint immediately to ensure continued data access.
assumptions: The audience is internal engineering, so technical terms like 'endpoint' and 'DST' are appropriate.
The tone should be professional and direct.
known_risks: Word count must be strictly monitored to stay within the 60-100 range.

New: We added CSV export capabilities across all chart views and introduced a new dark mode to reduce eye strain. Fixed: We resolved a timezone bug that caused chart timestamps to be one hour off during DST transitions, ensuring data accuracy. Breaking: The /api/v1/metrics endpoint has been removed. payload.final_text: Version 2.4.0 introduces several improvements and critical updates for the internal dashboard tool. New: We added CSV export functionality on all chart views and implemented a dark mode for better visibility during night shifts. Fixed: We resolved a timezone bug that caused chart timestamps to be one hour off during DST transitions, ensuring accurate data representation. Breaking: Please note that the /api/v1/metrics endpoint is removed. Clients must migrate to /v2/metrics immediately to maintain functionality and avoid service disruptions in your integrations.
